title: diphryllum japonicum
intro: Diphryllum japonicum, also known as the Japanese club moss, is a type of evergreen plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Diphryllum japonicum include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting respiratory health, making it a popular herbal remedy for various conditions. Diphryllum japonicum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
